SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: Operation Santa Claus. Raffle tickets are distributed in exchange for toy, clothing or food donations. The grand prize of the raffle is a vehicle donated by Sanderson Ford, Inc.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: Golf tournament. Event is held as part of the kick off to Operation Santa Claus. Net revenue provides funds to distribute to various public charities.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: Silent auction. Event is held as part of the kick off to Operation Santa Claus. Revenue provides funds to distribute to various public charities. No auction was held in 2018.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: Antique auto and collectible museum. Expenditures were for the maintenance of museum pieces and displays.

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Ronald McDonald House Charities of Phoenix

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: Charity that helps & disburses tofamilies in need.
Charity that disburses tofamilies in need.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: Operation Santa Claus provides toys, clothing and food to needy
and military families. Individuals receive a raffle ticket in
exchange for a toy, clothing or food contribution. The raffle
ticket represents a chance to win a vehicle donated by Sanderson
Ford, Inc. In 2019, around 32,000 toys and clothing items and
98,635 pounds of food were contributed in exchange for raffle
tickets. The toys and clothing items are valued at $20 a piece
and the food is valued at $1.65 a pound. The toys, clothing and
food are then donated to selected public charities that distribute
the items to needy and military families.
The golf tournament is held at the beginning of "Operation Santa Claus"
and provides funds that are donated to selected public charities. In
2019, through sponsorships and entry fees, the golf tournament's net
loss was ($7,346) (Gross revenue of $116,190, less direct costs of
